scene_title: Gigante Nefilim em campo de batalha antigo
narrative_beat: Ser colossal em carmesim e ouro com olhos sobrenaturais

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid colossal Nephilim giant in crimson and gold armor with partially human partially angelic features expression of corrupted power and supernatural glowing eyes in dominant pose in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the Nephilim's corrupted power expression and supernatural glowing eyes
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated ancient battlefield ruins with scattered grey weapons and shields in background
props: Nephilim giant in crimson and gold armor

mood.emotion: the Nephilim as the first hybrid — Watcher plus human

symbolism.primary: the hybrid as the template: superior intelligence plus human vessel
symbolism.secondary: glowing eyes as the supernatural override of natural limitations

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
